---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for CleanBot
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear one-sentence description of the feature.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who benefits, and how? Link to any related issues.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like it to work. Include pseudocode, diagrams, or references if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why did you rule them out?

## Privacy / Ethics Check

Does this feature touch camera data, telemetry, or user-facing output?  
If yes, describe how it stays consistent with CleanBot's privacy-first design.

## Additional Context

Any other context, references, or prior art.
